step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and damp slicked-back styling, body proportions, white waffle-knit bathrobe, and the entire bathroom vanity scene including the round mirror, marble counter, ivory ceramic skincare bottles, and warm wall sconces — all of these must remain faithful to the reference, including her reflection in the mirror. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her right hand at chest level, held close to her face for inspection: her right arm bent at the elbow, wrist relaxed, fingers curved around the box with thumb on the front face, four fingers wrapping around the back edge, the box angled slightly toward her face with the front face still visible to the camera. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand and face. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural. The product must also appear correctly mirrored in the round mirror reflection. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product, her left hand rests on the marble counter edge. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; only apply the scene's directional lighting on top, do not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: warm sconce lighting on either side of the mirror, soft warm wash across the box, gentle warm rim from the sconces on the box surface.
